positive: A stylized celestial animal silhouette, depicting a majestic griffin merging into constellations and stardust. The griffin is positioned centrally, wings outstretched in a powerful, elegant pose. The aesthetic is neo-tribal cosmicism, combining intricate geometric patterns (mandala-like elements) with the organic flow of mythic anatomy. Use deep midnight blues, electric purples, metallic gold accents, and glowing turquoise highlights. The style should be high-contrast, clean vector art with strong black lines and solid color blocking, making it perfect for single-color screen printing on apparel. Composition should utilize negative space effectively, emphasizing the central form. Cosmic dust should appear as fine, legible particles, not abstract noise. Clean, sharp focus, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, disfigured, copyright, cartoon, photograph
